description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that includes the "/templates/job/.base.yml" template. Define a yamllint job that extends .base_tpl, runs in the lint stage, uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/pipeline-components/yamllint:latest, and executes the shell commands find . -type f \( -name "*.yml" -and ! -name "*vault*" \) | xargs -r yamllint followed by a loop for file in $files_to_lint; do yamllint $file; done. The job has no caches, artifacts, or special rules.
